name: CyberPower Smart App Sinewave PR1000LCDRT1U 1000VA/800W 1U Rackmount UPS System - Sine Wave - 7x NEMA 5-15R Outlets - Line Interactive - 120 VAC ± 5% - SNMP / HTTP Remote Monitoring - USB & Serial Management Ports (PR1000LCDRT1U)
